title: Poll Job
purpose: Poll an AI job or database query until it completes.

configFields.description: job = poll AI job status; database = poll database query.
Poll frequency.
Maximum retry limit before failing.
Database provider (mongodb; auto resolves to MongoDB).
Collection to query (example: products).
preset uses a predefined query; custom uses queryTemplate.
Preset query shape (by_id/by_productId/by_entityId/by_field).
Field used by preset queries (example: _id, productId).
How to treat IDs: string vs objectId.
JSON query template (string) with {{placeholders}}.
Limit for multi-result queries.
Sort JSON (string).
Projection JSON (string).
If true, treat result as a single document.
JSON path in result to check for completion.
equals/not_equals/contains/in.
Value that indicates success (string/number).
JSON path to the actual data to emit on result port.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
Cache key scope. run = isolate each run, activation = isolate by trigger/entity context, session = reuse across session.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.

semanticNodeExample.title: Poll Job
semanticNodeExample.description: Poll an AI job or database query until it completes.
